name: Unpatched systems
treatment: Patch monthly, scan weekly with vulnerability scanner

name: Phishing attack
treatment: User awareness training, email filtering, MFA

name: Insider threat
treatment: Access control reviews, audit logging, separation of duties

name: DDoS attack
treatment: Rate limiting, upstream DDoS filtering service

name: Data breach via SQL injection
treatment: Parameterized queries, input validation, WAF, pen testing

name: Lost or stolen laptop
treatment: Full disk encryption, MDM remote wipe capability
